title: AeroTune Wireless Headphones
name: AeroTune Wireless Headphones
description: Wireless over-ear headphones with active noise reduction, foldable design, and up to 32 hours of battery life.
target_audience: Commuters, students, and remote workers who need focused listening on a budget.
value_proposition: Comfortable everyday noise reduction without premium headphone pricing.
warranty_or_return_policy: 30-day returns and a 1-year limited hardware warranty.
shipping_info: Standard shipping in 3-5 business days; shipping cost shown at checkout.
reviews_or_social_proof: Early tester quotes are being collected; no public reviews yet.
image_notes: Hero image should show the headphones folded and worn by a commuter.

title: StrideLite Daily Running Shoes
name: StrideLite Daily Running Shoes
description: Lightweight road running shoes designed for short daily runs, walking, and gym commutes.
target_audience: Beginner runners and active commuters who want one comfortable daily shoe.
value_proposition: A simple everyday running shoe with breathable comfort and practical pricing.
reviews_or_social_proof: Pre-launch product with no customer reviews yet.
image_notes: Needs clear sole, side, and on-foot images to show cushioning and fit.

title: FocusFlow Desk Mat
name: FocusFlow Desk Mat
description: A washable desk mat with task zones for a laptop, notebook, mouse, and daily priorities.
target_audience: Remote workers who want a calmer and more organized desk setup.
value_proposition: Turns a cluttered desk into a simple visual workspace without adding another app.
warranty_or_return_policy: Unused items can be returned within 30 days.
shipping_info: Ships flat in recyclable packaging; estimated delivery is 4-7 business days.
reviews_or_social_proof: No public reviews yet; intended for pre-launch page testing.
image_notes: Show a realistic desk setup with laptop, notebook, and mouse for scale.
